name: האמריקאים
overview: "The Americans" (2025) is an Israeli docu-reality series from Reshet 13, which follows five successful Israelis in Los Angeles - Sigal Style, Yakir Levy, Assaf Belcher, Lee Alon and Mozes Hachmon. The series documents their glittering lives, combining Hollywood careers with longing and maintaining an Israeli identity, while presenting their experiences in the "City of Angels."

trailers.title: "אני גאה להיות ישראלי": הכירו את האנשים שעברו לאמריקה ולא שכחו מאיפה הם באו
